title: Sorry Notice
description: Schema for an incident or maintenance notice in the Sorry app platform

type.description: Type of notice: unplanned (incident), planned (maintenance), or general

state.description: Current state of the notice (e.g., open, monitoring, resolved)

subject.description: Title of the notice displayed to customers

tag_list.description: List of tags associated with the notice

began_at.description: When the incident or maintenance began

ended_at.description: When the incident or maintenance ended

updated_at.description: When the notice was last updated
